tagline: Wear It Before You Buy It.
hero_desc: Upload your photo and select the item you want to wear. Our AI network preserves fabric texture to produce a flawless result.
tech_desc: Designed to increase sales and reduce returns.
feat_1_desc: Our optimized cloud GPU architecture eliminates waiting times. High-resolution results ready instantly.
feat_2_desc: Your personal data and photos are only processed momentarily, then destroyed from servers within milliseconds.
feat_3_desc: The system simulates light reflections of textures like silk, cotton or linen to achieve reality.
steps_desc: No complex settings needed. All you need is two photos.
step_1_desc: Upload a full-body, well-lit photo to the system.
step_2_desc: Add the garment image you want to try on as reference.
step_3_desc: Our model calculates body contours and renders the final image.
pricing_desc: No hidden fees, no commitment. Buy only as many credits as you need.
faq_1_a: Yes, when you register you receive gift credits to test our infrastructure at no cost.
faq_2_a: Purchased or gifted credits have no expiration date.
faq_3_q: Can I integrate it into my e-commerce site?
faq_3_a: Via our RESTful API, you can add this Virtual Fitting Room experience to your own site as White Label.
faq_4_q: What should photos look like for best results?
faq_4_a: Well-lit photos where arms and legs are clearly visible produce the most realistic results.
cta_title: Step Into the Store of the Future
cta_desc: Give your customers an unforgettable experience. Create an account now.
footer_desc: High-performance AI fitting room infrastructure developed for next-generation e-commerce and fashion brands.
dashboard_sub: Your virtual fitting studio is ready.
no_generations: You haven't created any AI try-ons yet.
no_domains: You haven't added any domains yet.
custom_credit_desc: Purchase any amount of credits outside of packages. 1 credit = 4.90 ₺
pkg_baslangic_desc: The perfect starter package to explore the system.
pkg_pro_desc: The most popular choice for regular users.
login_sub: Sign in to your account and continue trying.
register_sub: Try for free, buy a plan if you love it.

add_domain_sub: Enter your domain name, choose an extension and registration period. It will be activated after admin approval.
domain_name_invalid: Domain name can only contain letters, numbers, and hyphens (-).

error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
domain_already_exists: This domain has already been added or is awaiting approval.
domain_submitted: Your domain request has been successfully submitted. Awaiting admin approval.
domain_delete_not_found: This domain request could not be found or cannot be deleted.
